div.h2: Signal Delivery in Multithreaded Processes: Safe Pattern

g.text: NOT Async-Signal-Safe — Never Call in Handler
Step 1 — Block in main BEFORE spawning
SIGTERM / SIGINT BLOCKED in all workers
Step 3 — Main thread: sigwait() synchronous receive
Delivered to main only — deterministic, race-free
Main thread: select() on pipe read-end
Go runtime masks signals in OS threads
Analogous to sigwait() — synchronous in goroutine
SAFE to call from signal handler
malloc() / free() | heap lock held | UB
printf() / fprintf | stdio lock held | deadlock
any STL / libc++ | internal mutexes | UB

text.tspan: /* spawn workers here — they inherit blocked mask */
/* spawn workers here — they inherit blocked mask */
